creator: matthew@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 242227
update to 0.17.26

Hi, can we update devel/py-ruamel.yaml to the latest (0.17.26) one more time please?

Seems the ansible-lint crowd are submitting bug reports to ruamel.yaml for problems discovered through their pytest configuration, and there have been some recent fixes that are now required in the latest ansible-lint release.
